Figure 4: Sensitivity analysis of GMean performance utilizing CLAHE-enhanced synthetic volumes.

Figure 3: Impact of training set composition on GMean performance across real and synthetic testing domains. The dashed line indicates the CT-only baseline. The red line represents performance on real PET test data, while the blue line represents performance on synthetic PET test data.
